summary: A young girl, Elric, was born with flaws that made her an outcast. She met a group of children who played a game called the Spring Frost and became friends with them. However, her powers accidentally froze everything around her, leading to her isolation. Years later, she meets a boy named Winter, who becomes her friend and helps alleviate her loneliness.
key_moments: Elric's accidental freezing of the world
The children playing the Spring Frost game
Winter meeting Elric and becoming her friend
